extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon won from breakaway while PINOT attacked final 4km, ALAPHILIPPE cracked but defended yellow by 27 seconds aided by THOMAS pacing.
tactical_patterns: PINOT attacked with 4km to summit, exploiting ALAPHILIPPE's isolation after teammates dropped, gaining crucial time on yellow.
THOMAS paced ALAPHILIPPE back when cracked, showing Ineos prioritized defending yellow over BERNAL's GC ambitions mid-stage.
BERNAL attempted to follow PINOT's acceleration but cracked, revealing yellow jersey defense trumped team leader ambitions for Ineos.
ALAPHILIPPE survived with no teammates for many kilometers despite multiple accelerations, suggesting deep reserves but tactical vulnerability when isolated.

rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: Attacked 4km from summit with such power BERNAL couldn't hold wheel, exceptional climbing form throughout tour
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Cracked on final climb requiring THOMAS pacing, lost 27 seconds but vulnerability signals yellow unsustainable in Alps
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Couldn't hold PINOT's wheel 4km out despite trying, revealing Ineos hierarchy favors defending ALAPHILIPPE over BERNAL attacks
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Strong enough to pace ALAPHILIPPE back when isolated, defending champion showing form but team tactics prevent personal ambition
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Came from depths of peloton to contend for podium, master of steady tempo climbing gained significant time
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: Lost over 3 minutes starting day in seventh overall, major collapse from EF leader
